title: Old dyes to newer versions
description: Now you can bring back the old dye textures.
body:
🎨 Old Dye Resourcepack  
Bring back the classics—revive the vintage dye textures in modern Minecraft!  
This resourcepack restores the pre-1.21.8 dye icons, giving your inventory a nostalgic touch while staying fully compatible with the latest versions.

✨ Features  
✅ Replaces dye item textures with their classic designs (e.g. red, blue, lime)  
✅ Faithful recreation of legacy pixel art for Minecraft 1.21.9+  
🧩 Seamless integration with vanilla names and crafting recipes  
🔁 Modular asset structure for easy editing and texture swaps  
🛠️ Works with Minecraft 1.21.9+
